calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judicial Determination Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike, Or In The Alternaitve, Motion To Tax Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT PAUL MCGRATH's Motion To Strike, Or In The Alternative, Motion To Tax Costs.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to tax costs is granted. On April 16, 2025, the court entered judgment and served it on the parties by mail on that date. CRC 3.1700(a)(1) provides that the prevailing party must file and serve the costs memorandum within 15 days after service of the notice of entry of judgment. Here, the costs memorandum, which also claimed fees, was untimely filed on May 23, 2025. Defendant's motion to tax is therefore granted.

Order submitted.

Judge: John M. True; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/JMT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judicial Determination Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF LAUREN FIGUEROA's Motion For Judicial Determination Of Attorney Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for judicial determination of fees is denied. On April 16, 2025, the court entered judgment and served it on the parties by mail on that date. CRC 3.1700(a)(1) provides that the prevailing party must file and serve the costs memorandum within 15 days after service of the notice of entry of judgment. Here, the costs memorandum, which also claimed fees, was untimely filed on May 23, 2025. Plaintiff's request for fees is therefore denied.

Order submitted.

Judge: John M. True; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/JMT)
